title: Trapping Rain Water
prompt: Given an elevation map (bar widths = 1), compute trapped water after rain.
hints: Water above i = min(maxLeft, maxRight) - height[i] (clamped at 0).
Two pointers achieves O(1) extra space by always advancing the side with the smaller running max.

optimal.approach: Two pointers tracking left/right running max

pitfalls: Comparing leftMax to rightMax instead of height[l] to height[r] — invariant is on the *current* sides.
Forgetting to update the running max before adding water leads to negative contributions.
followups: Trapping Rain Water II (LC 407) — 2D version, requires a min-heap.
